title: lomatogonium lijiangense
intro: Lomatogonium lijiangense, also known as Li Jiang forget-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Lomatogonium lijiangense is often used in the form of tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be dried and encapsulated for convenience.
